global_description: A medium-sized, stocky songbird with a robust body and a large, conical bill. It features a striking combination of bright yellow and black plumage with white wing patches. The bird has a short tail and a thick neck.

part_details.body: Bright yellow with a robust, stocky appearance.
part_details.wings: Black with prominent white patches, broad and strong.
part_details.bill: Large, conical, pale ivory color, suited for cracking seeds.
part_details.head: Yellow with a thick neck, black crown.

spatial_relations: The large bill is positioned at the front of the head.
The black wings extend from the sides of the yellow body.
The short tail is at the rear of the body.
